items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 就美国政府出口管制指令再次声明，要求立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问，包括已发放的 API 凭证。相对此前的初步指令，本次明确覆盖「全部访问」并扩展至已下发的 API key。已有调用 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的系统必须立即迁移。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把所有调用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的端点迁移到 Claude Opus 4.8（若已在用）或 Claude Sonnet 4.x；轮换/吊销可能已外泄的 Fable 5/Mythos 5 API key；并向法务确认该指令的地理范围是否波及中国/其他受控地区调用。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Tag，一种团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。原文摘要将多条公告混入同页（含 Claude Corps、Project Glasswing 等），主要新产品信息有限，属协作/组织层面能力，与 API/SDK 调用方关系不明。需要进一步查看具体接口形态。
items.backend_focus: 关注 Claude Tag 是否提供 API/SDK 接入点（标签管理、权限或上下文标记）。目前信息不足以判断对调用方影响，建议暂不行动，等待 Anthropic 发布完整 API 文档与字段说明。

items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 社区受益。这是人才/品牌项目，并非模型或 API 更新。对 SDK、API 字段、计费、限流均无影响。与工程无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。属雇主品牌与人才项目，无任何 API/SDK/模型版本变化。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展至约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。这是企业合作/CSR 类公告，无新模型、无新 API 字段、无 SDK 变更。与工程无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。属企业合作范围扩张，不涉及 API/SDK/模型版本变化。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，对 Opus 系列升级，强化编程、Agent 任务与专业工作表现，并附带相关一致性改进。相对 Claude Opus 4.5/4.7 在长时 Agent、工具调用稳定性上有进一步提升。旧 Opus 4.x 仍可使用一段时间，建议评估升级以利用更强的 agentic 能力。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：把 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-5 等旧值切到 claude-opus-4-8，重点验证 Tool Use、MCP 集成与 max_tokens/context window 在长上下文 Agent 任务下的表现。留意 Anthropic 对 Opus 4.5/4.7 的 deprecation 时间线。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 开设首尔办公室并与韩国 AI 生态达成多项新合作，是区域市场拓展公告。相对此前的日本、新加坡等亚洲布局，本次新增韩国节点。短期内不影响 API 区域可用性细节，但提示韩国/亚太合规与本地化需求上升。
items.backend_focus: 关注亚太区域调用：核对当前 Anthropic API 端点对韩国/亚太区域的可用性与数据驻留承诺；若服务韩国用户，评估是否需要切换区域端点。无代码层立即改动。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首个 Public Record 的结果，是公司透明度与公共记录机制的第一期内容。属于政策/治理信息披露，不涉及任何模型版本、API 字段、SDK 变更。与工程无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。属公司透明度报告，无 API/SDK/模型/计费变化。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业。这是企业合作公告，不涉及 API 新参数、模型新版本或 SDK 变更。与工程无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。属渠道合作公告，无 API/SDK/模型变化。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成合作，将 Claude 集成进银行、航空等受监管行业所依赖的系统。这是企业合作公告，不涉及 API 新参数、新模型版本或 SDK 变更。与工程无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。属企业合作公告，无 API/SDK/模型变化。
